§7Guide Book #108§r

§lArcane Quill§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lTrade by§r: Scrollwright
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table, Artifacture Table.
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lUsed to craft§r: Magic Spells Table, Scroll of Regeneration,
Scroll of Protection, Scroll of Strength.§’
